_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of staffing, contracting, and budgetary requirements to run an AI-enabled organization.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of AI governance structures, including model risk management, AI lifecycle oversight, accountability assignment, and the organizational conditions that enable responsible AI deployment at scale.
comments: DCWF ksa equal WIDAI AG domain. AG-K-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-T-018 (AI, cosine: 0.676), AG-A-003 (AG, cosine: 0.664).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.9/10 (raw 0.490). Shared vocabulary: [ai, knowledge]. DCWF-only terms [budgetary, contracting, enabled, organization, requirements, run] vs WIDAI-only terms [accountability, assignment, conditions, deployment, enable, governance] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.901 (P=0.917, R=0.885). P exceeds R by 0.032 — the DCWF element's 12 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 25 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (92.7%). "Knowledge of staffing, contracting, and budgetary requirements to run an AI-enab" and "Knowledge of AI governance structures, including model risk management, AI lifec" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.691 > STS 0.490 (gap +0.200). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [ai, knowledge] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 12.5%. Shared tokens: [ai, knowledge]. DCWF-only: [budgetary, contracting, enabled, organization, requirements, run]. WIDAI-only: [accountability, assignment, conditions, deployment, enable, governance].

signals.detail: STS 0.490 barely clears classification threshold for Equal. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.

Bi-encoder/STS gap 0.200 with low STS 0.490. Candidate selection was likely driven by shared vocabulary rather than functional alignment. The functionally correct KSA may not have been in the top-5 candidates.
